name: Final Clue
tagline: One sentence. Many questions. One hidden story.
description: The moderator knows the truth. Everyone else can only ask questions until they reconstruct what happened.
objective: Work together to uncover the hidden story behind each mysterious situation.

rules.title: Before you start
rules.subtitle: Choose a moderator and keep the back of the card secret.
rules.step1: The moderator chooses a card and privately reads the full story.
rules.step2: The group only receives the mysterious sentence and tries to reconstruct the facts.
rules.step3: The moderator may only say Yes, No, or Irrelevant.
rules.step4: Once the essential facts are uncovered, mark the card as solved.
rules.compactSecret: The moderator privately reads the back and repeats only the summary to the group.
rules.compactQuestions: Players ask questions; the moderator only answers Yes, No, or Irrelevant.
rules.compactResolve: Once the story is uncovered, mark the card as solved.

deck.title: Deck
deck.deckCompleteDescription: Your group solved every available story.
deck.sequentialDescription: Restore the cards to their original numbered order
deck.solvedCardsDescription: {{count}} cards have been solved. Choose one to review.
deck.resetDescription: Solved cards will become available again. This does not change the deck content.

privacy.title: Only the moderator should look
privacy.description: Ask everyone else to look away before revealing the back of the card.

back.close: Close story and return to card
back.essentialDescription: The group does not need every detail, but should uncover these ideas.

playing.instruction: Ask questions until you reconstruct the story.
